---
title: "Tokyo Night"
description: "Tokyo Night colors for terminal interfaces."
---

<ComponentPreview
  base="ink"
  name="theme-showcase"
  theme="tokyo-night"
  hideCode
/>

## Installation

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add @termcn/theme-tokyo-night
```

## Usage

```tsx
import { ThemeProvider } from "@/components/ui/theme-provider";
import { tokyoNightTheme } from "@/lib/terminal-themes/tokyo-night";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";

export function Example() {
  return (
    <ThemeProvider theme={tokyoNightTheme}>
      <Badge variant="info">Tokyo Night</Badge>
    </ThemeProvider>
  );
}
```
